overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along a rain-slicked rooftop in a gothic city at night. The scene features a large full moon, neon-lit industrial buildings, and atmospheric searchlights as Batman surveys the cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked rooftop with gothic city vista

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the rooftop edge, cape flowing behind him, surveying the illuminated gothic cityscape ahead

entered.detail: wet concrete rooftop with metal railings and industrial textures
tall gothic tower with large stone face sculpture near the top and illuminated windows
large glowing screen on the tower displaying colorful imagery
blue and white illuminated signs including GCPD lettering visible in the distance
large bright full moon dominating the cloudy night sky
rotating spotlight beams sweeping across the skyline from the left

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a rain-slicked rooftop at night, the camera following from behind. The gothic cityscape stretches ahead with a prominent illuminated tower featuring a stone face sculpture rising in the distance. Searchlights sweep across the skyline while neon signs glow in the background under a large full moon.

events.description: Batman slightly turns right while continuing to walk, shifting focus from the tower to the broader cityscape

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rooftop, moving past the illuminated tower while observing the surrounding gothic architecture and distant industrial chimneys

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with illuminated windows appearing on the left side
tall smokestacks and industrial structures visible in the distant skyline

segments.scene_description: Batman continues walking along the rooftop, passing the large illuminated tower which now recedes to the right. A gothic apartment building with lit windows becomes visible on the left, while industrial chimneys rise in the distant center. The camera maintains a steady follow as the character surveys the sprawling city below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked rooftop that shifts from a focus on a distant gothic monument to a broader view of the industrial cityscape. It begins with the camera following Batman from behind as he walks toward a prominent illuminated tower featuring a stone face sculpture, while searchlights sweep across a skyline lit by neon signs and a large full moon. As he advances, the camera maintains its steady pace, causing the tower to recede to the right and open up the perspective of the surrounding environment. The scene then expands to reveal a gothic apartment building with glowing windows on the left and industrial chimneys rising in the distant center. Finally, the movement continues forward, allowing the character to survey the sprawling, atmospheric city below.
